questionHtml:
A list of four physical quantities is

  • acceleration
  • energy
  • mass
  • temperature

How many scalar quantities are in this list?

A.  1

B.  2

C.  3

D.  4

meta.title: A list of four physical quantities is acceleration energy mass temperature How many scalar quantities are in this list? A. 1 B. 2 C. 3 D. 4
